name: cloudflare-sandbox-bridge
description: Cloudflare Worker that exposes the sandbox HTTP API via the @cloudflare/sandbox SDK

SANDBOX_API_KEY.description: Bearer token for API authentication. Generate with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

WARM_POOL_TARGET.description: Number of pre-warmed containers to keep ready (0 disables the warm pool).

WARM_POOL_REFRESH_INTERVAL.description: Milliseconds between warm pool health checks (default: 10000).
